A LOCAL ART CLUB FOR GALLERY-GOERS AND ART ENTHUSIASTS

Art and
After

See the work. Then talk it over.

We walk a local gallery once a month, then linger nearby to discuss what we saw.

See where we've been

Why we look

The purpose of art

What art offers is space—a certain breathing room for the spirit.
— John Updike
I found I could say things with color and shapes that I couldn't say any other way—things I had no words for.
— Georgia O'Keeffe
We have art in order not to die of the truth.
— Friedrich Nietzsche
Art is the concrete representation of our most subtle feelings.
— Agnes Martin

We visit a new gallery every month, then head somewhere nearby after. New faces are always welcome — no need to know anything about art beforehand.
